faq.developersA: The index currently lists {developers} with projects in {area}.
faq.unitsQ: What types of units are available in {area}?
faq.offPlanAYes: Yes — the index currently lists {count, plural, one {# off-plan project} other {# off-plan projects}} in {area}.
faq.offPlanANo: The index does not currently list any off-plan projects in {area}; the projects shown are ready or under construction.
faq.verifyQ: How do I verify a project in {area} before buying?
faq.verifyA: Check the project's registration and escrow status with the Dubai Land Department via the official Dubai REST app before any transaction. Every project page on DXBPROPERTY GATE shows its DLD permit number where verified.

why.title: A quieter way to read the market

curated.title: Curated coverage
curated.body: Twenty-six developers, up to ten projects each. A deliberate index, not an endless feed.

verified.title: Verified against DLD
verified.body: Prices, permits and handover dates are published only when verified. Missing means unconfirmed — never guessed.

developersPage.title: The twenty-six
developersPage.intro: Every developer in the index — filter by segment or search by name.

about.title: One gate to the Dubai market
about.intro: DXBPROPERTY GATE is a curated index of Dubai's top developers and their projects — built for buyers and investors who want the market organised, not advertised.

how.title: How it works
how.body1: We organise the market by its makers. Each of the twenty-six developers in the index has its own profile, its flagship projects, and the areas it builds in — all cross-linked so you can move from a district to a developer to a launch in two clicks.
how.body2: When something interests you, register your interest. We route it toward the right developer and project — no listing portals, no bidding for your attention.

trust.title: What we publish, and what we don't
trust.body1: Prices, handover dates, payment plans and permit numbers appear only when verified against official sources, including the Dubai Land Department. If a figure is missing, it is unconfirmed — we leave it out rather than guess.
trust.body2: DXBPROPERTY GATE is a discovery platform, not a broker of record for any transaction. Always verify a project's licensing and escrow via the Dubai Land Department (Dubai REST) before you commit.
